entities.name: CRM Query
entities.context: A command-line interface tool for querying the CRM database, used to list, search, and find stale contacts

entities.name: CRM database
entities.context: The underlying database that stores CRM (Customer Relationship Management) data, queried by the crm-query command

entities.name: V
entities.context: The user of this command (implied), referring to Vrijen Attawar, founder of Careerspan

relationships.context: The CRM Query command-line interface queries the CRM database for operations like listing, searching, and finding stale contacts
V uses this command-line interface tool to manage and query CRM contacts
